hero.title: Send Money Across Africa Instantly
hero.subtitle: Send, receive and convert money across Africa in seconds. A multi-currency wallet with low fees and no banking hassle.
hero.waitlistNote: Now in early access, join the waitlist
hero.blurbLeft: Send, receive and convert across currencies, and track every transfer in real time.
hero.blurbRight: One simple, mobile-first wallet built for everyday cross-border payments.

why.subtitle: Experience the future of cross-border payments — designed for speed, reliability, and safety in the African money transfer market.
why.realtimeRest: verify accounts, monitor activity, and ensure compliance standards.

fast.title: Fast Global Transfers
fast.desc: Send money anywhere in the world in minutes, not days. Our real-time rails connect 180+ countries with guaranteed delivery windows.

fees.title: Low & Transparent Fees
fees.desc: No hidden charges. See exactly what you pay upfront with our transparent fee structure. Save up to 90% on transfer costs.

secure.title: Secure & Compliant
secure.desc: Bank-level security with AES-256 encryption, KYC verification, and full regulatory compliance across every market we operate in.

monitoring.title: Real-Time Monitoring
monitoring.desc: Verify accounts, monitor activity, and ensure compliance standards, all in real time with instant alerts and audit-ready logs.

features.title: Everything you need to move money
features.crossBorderDesc: Send to bank accounts across borders, settled on Stellar.
features.multiCurrencyDesc: Hold and convert NGN, GHS, USD and XLM in one place.
features.lowFeesDesc: Transparent rates with no hidden charges.
features.secureDesc: KYC, liveness checks, and multi-signature protection.

seamless.title: Seamless Financial Solutions for Everyone
seamless.subtitle: Discover how RendBit simplifies your financial transactions with cutting-edge technology and user-friendly features.
seamless.depositDesc: Use a card, Apple Pay, Google Pay or PayPal to buy crypto fast. We also accept bank transfers and wires in applicable jurisdictions.
seamless.swapDesc: Swap easily on RendBit on the Stellar Blockchain.
seamless.transferDesc: Effortlessly transfer money across Africa without the need to create additional accounts to support different currencies.
seamless.aiSavingsDesc: Our AI system analyses your spending pattern and suggest a saving structure for you, and help you save.

appBanner.title: Start Sending Money Today
appBanner.subtitle: Join thousands of users who trust RendBit for fast, secure, and affordable international transfers

appInAction.title: Your money, in a few taps.
appInAction.subtitle: Tap through the steps to see how you send, convert and track money on RendBit.

glance.title: Your money at a glance
glance.desc: See your balance and jump into Top Up, Send, Convert or Assets in a single tap.

fund.title: Fund your wallet
fund.desc: Add money via XLM, a local bank transfer, or a payment request. Whatever's easiest.

convert.title: Convert currencies
convert.desc: Swap between NGN, USD, GHS and more in seconds, right from your wallet.

track.title: Track every transfer
track.desc: A clear, searchable history of everything you send, receive and convert.

secure.title: Verified & secure
secure.desc: Identity-verified accounts with two-factor and biometric protection built in.

partners.title: In good company
partners.subtitle: RendBit is funded by Stellar and works with Linkio, our anchor for moving money between digital assets and local currencies.

stellar.blurb: Backed by Stellar, the open network for fast, low-cost cross-border payments.

linkio.blurb: Our anchor partner, bridging digital assets and local bank rails.

howItWorks.title: Start in 3 simple steps
howItWorks.subtitle: Experience the future of cross-border payments — designed for speed, reliability, and safety in the African money transfer market. No friction, no confusion. Just flow.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Download the app and complete our quick KYC verification process in minutes
howItWorks.step2Desc: Add money to your wallet using bank transfer, card, or mobile money
howItWorks.step3Desc: Transfer funds instantly to any supported country with real-time tracking

cta.title: Ready to get started?
cta.subtitle: Create your RendBit account in minutes.
